use_cases: Displaying software version updates and release notes in a timeline format
Showing changelog entries with version badges and timestamps
Highlighting new features, bug fixes, and improvements for users
Providing version-specific change categorization with styled badges
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui Badge component with variant props (default, secondary, destructive, outline) used as part of a changelog display system. Features inline-flex styling with rounded borders and focus ring accessibility. Used in changelog components to display version numbers, status labels, or category indicators within a timeline of software updates and release notes.
